filename: Company Plans - Building the Mission and the Vision.docx
summary: This document outlines the deprecated mission and vision for KeepMeCompany, originally drafted in Spanish. It defines the target audience as families of elderly relatives and proposes a platform to increase interaction touchpoints. Long-term goals include global expansion and additional services like caregiver coordination and gift delivery.
